chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N.D- 516 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 12.10.2023 Mr. Ishan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahid Hussain Jogi, Advocate for respondents 5 & 6 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Respondents No.5 & 6 submits that entire amount has been paid to the petitioner save Rs.1,10,768/-, which would be paid to the petitioner in this month. However, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that on account of differential amount of Rs.10,00,000/- and leave encashment of Rs.3,93,000/- for 365 days are outstanding against the department. Learned counsel for Respondents No.5 and 6 submits that the documents have been sent to the audit department for the purpose of audit and if the claims are verified to be genuine, such amount would be disbursed to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI Judge Judge ARBROHI
